features: 2 Fragrance - The fresh, crisp linen aroma fills the entire car and the odour dissipates. Lavender fresh and lovely fragrance, more suitable for women
6 Car Air Fresheners - Each fragrance has 3 counts, the capacity of individual car perfume is 4ml, the total is 24ml. A single car freshener lasts for approximately 30 days to keep your car fresh
Easy to Use - Pull down the perfume seal to open the pack, then fix the aromatherapy clip onto the air vent, finally move the paddles above the aromatherapy to adjust the fragrance concentration

Keep the Air Fresh - After a long time in the use of cars will inevitably have odour, especially after the rainy days of the car odour will be more obvious, so the use of our car aromatherapy can help you clear the car odour, so that you can better enjoy the driving journey
After-sales service - If you have doubts about the product after purchase, welcome to consult our customer service, we will give you a satisfactory answer
